name: seed corpus: seed/pr-corpus-patterns/patterns.jsonl contains exactly 20 hand-curated patterns
command: count=$(wc -l < "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/pr-corpus-patterns/patterns.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); [ "$count" = "20" ] && echo "ok count=$count" 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL count=$count expected 20" 1>&2; exit 1; }
